about.heading: An organisation that has been working for over 40 years
about.p1: The Student Government of Wrocław University of Economics and Business is an organisation that for over 40 years has represented students’ interests before the university authorities, the city and national institutions. We run projects, organise events and make sure the student voice is heard.
about.p2: We bring together people who care. Anyone of you can join our team and help shape the UEW academic community.
about.quote: We don’t wait for change. We create it.

juwenalia.name: Economic Juwenalia
juwenalia.description: The biggest UEW student festival. Three days of music, sport and fun.

tarcza.name: Student Shield
tarcza.description: Free legal help for students. We advise on regulatory matters and beyond.

p1.heading: We build a student community
p1.lead: University is the people you meet.
p1.body: From Adapciak and Adaptation Days to the UEW Ball, TEDxUEW and UE Party — all year round we create events that bring students together, help them grow and stay in memory for years.

p2.heading: We’re on your side
p2.lead: When you need help, we’re right here.
p2.body: Student rights, scholarships, psychological support, the Student Ombudsman — in the Student zone we’ve gathered everything you need in your everyday life at the university.

partnerzy.wallSub: Click an open slot to see what your presence could look like.

partnerzy.ctaDesc: Tell us about your idea for cooperation — we’ll prepare an offer tailored to your goals.
partnerzy.ctaAria: Go to the Work with us page

start.q: How do we start working with the Student Government?
start.a: Write to the person responsible for external relations — we’ll prepare an offer tailored to your goals. Contact: Karol Vogel, karol.vogel@samorzad.ue.wroc.pl, tel. +48 511 599 376.

forms.q: What forms of cooperation do you offer?
forms.a: Event organisation and partner zones, social media promotion (TikTok, Instagram, Facebook) and marketing campaigns tailored to the UEW student.

reach.q: How many students do you reach?
reach.a: We represent over 11,000 students of Wrocław University of Economics and Business.

tailored.q: Will you prepare an offer for a specific goal?
tailored.a: Yes — we tailor the offer to your product or service and to your campaign goals.

wspolpracuj.metaDesc: Reach 11,000 UEW students with your brand — events, social media promotion and marketing campaigns. Get in touch with our external relations board member.
wspolpracuj.heroLead: Let’s connect your brand with UEW’s largest student community — choose a form of cooperation and we’ll tailor the offer to you.
wspolpracuj.offerHeading: Want to reach students with your brand?
wspolpracuj.offerLead: We’ll help promote your product or service among UEW students. We’ll prepare an offer tailored to your goals — pick a form of cooperation and we’ll handle the rest.

events.title: Event organisation
events.desc: Joint events, partner zones and a presence where the students are.

social.title: Social media promotion
social.desc: Reaching the student community on TikTok, Instagram and Facebook.

campaigns.title: Marketing campaigns
campaigns.desc: Activities tailored to your product or service and to the UEW student.

kontakt.metaDesc: Get in touch with the Student Government of Wrocław University of Economics and Business — form, email, address (ul. Kamienna 43) and social media.
kontakt.heroLead: We’re here for you. Choose the way that suits you best — the form, email or social media.
kontakt.detailsLead: Got a question, an idea for cooperation or something to sort out? Write to us — we reply as fast as we can.
kontakt.errEmail: Enter a valid email address, e.g. jan@example.com.
kontakt.errMessage: Your message is too short (min. 10 characters).
kontakt.successBody: Your message has been received. We’ll get back to you as soon as possible.
kontakt.mapTitle: Map — SSUEW Student Government office, ul. Kamienna 43, Wrocław
